recommendations.title: Saint Seiya: Legend of Sanctuary
recommendations.overview: Mitsumasa Kido discovers a misterious baby in the himalayas whom he adopts as his grandaughter. 16 years later, Saori Kido is a young girl troubled by her mysterious powers. She is saved by Seiya from an assassin sent to kill her. Saori then learns s

recommendations.title: Saint Seiya: Legend of Crimson Youth
recommendations.overview: The Sun God Abel returns to life, bent on punishing the humans and cleansing Earth from their presence. When Athena joins him, leaving humans to their fate, the Bronze Saints must defend the world in their greatest battle yet.

recommendations.title: Saint Seiya: The Heated Battle of the Gods
recommendations.overview: Hyoga is missing somewhere in Asgard... When Seiya and the others are looking for him, Athena is kidnapped and they have to rescue her from Dolvar and some mysterious warriors.

recommendations.title: Steven Universe: The Movie
recommendations.genres: TV Movie, Animation, Family, Adventure, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: Two years after bringing peace to the galaxy, Steven Universe sees his past come back to haunt him in the form of a deranged Gem who wants to destroy the Earth.

recommendations.title: Ninja Scroll

recommendations.title: Mune: Guardian of the Moon

recommendations.title: One Piece Film Red
recommendations.overview: A new adventure begins for Luffy and his crew when mysterious pop superstar Uta unveils her identity — and launches a misguided plan for world peace.

recommendations.title: Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance

recommendations.title: Bayonetta: Bloody Fate
recommendations.overview: Bayonetta is an ancient witch who awakens from a five hundred-year slumber with no memory of her life. Armed with a gun in each limb, she embarks on a journey to rediscover her past, defeating all bloodthirsty angels that stand in her way.
